meta.title: Get started
meta.description: Set up your job search and optional local scraper.

step1.title: What are you looking for?
step1.description: Describe your ideal job and we'll generate search URLs across job boards for you.
step1.placeholder: e.g. I'm seeking a frontend React.js position at Cairo, Egypt, onsite
step1.generatingDescription: We're building search links for LinkedIn, Wuzzuf, Indeed and other boards. This may take a moment.

step2.title: Run scraper locally (optional)
step2.description: For the best experience and results, you can run the scraper on your Windows PC. Download the app, add your token, and click Start scraping.

step3.title: You're ready!
step3.description: Your job search is set up. Head to the jobs dashboard to see your listings.
